props.name: aside
props.comment:
Optional left-pane content (e.g. brand logo + testimonial). When
omitted, the layout renders the main pane full-width.

props.name: children
props.comment:
Content rendered in the main pane — typically a login, signup or
password-reset form.

props.name: className
props.comment: Extra class names applied to the root wrapper.

props.name: subtitle
props.comment: Optional subtitle shown below the heading.

props.name: title
props.comment: Optional heading shown above the main-pane content.
